top_signals.title: Bitcoin falls below $60,000, on track for a rare back-to-back quarterly loss
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX stock has cooled. Hiring for jobs in the space economy hasn't
top_signals.summary: The SpaceX IPO euphoria is over, but the bullish trend in space economy jobs remains in place within a labor market where many other sectors have slowed hiring.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Akihiro Miwa, iconic Japanese singer and actor, dies at 91
top_signals.summary: Miwa was best known for the hit song "Yoitomake no Uta" and his acclaimed stage performance in "Black Lizard."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
